meta.analysis: Deep Dive Directive 3: High-Resolution Paleoclimate Correlation

interpretation.key_question: Does the climate-divergence correlation survive at high resolution?
findings: 100yr bins, Soreq Cave (Bar-Matthews : r=0.1551, p=0.144297, n=90
100yr bins, Soreq Cave (Grant 2012 re: r=0.0491, p=0.646002, n=90
100yr bins, LC21 Core G. ruber (Grant: r=0.2445, p=0.020185, n=90
100yr bins, Jeita Cave J3 (Cheng 2016: r=-0.1757, p=0.097583, n=90
250yr bins, Soreq Cave (Bar-Matthews : r=0.0765, p=0.657501, n=36
250yr bins, Soreq Cave (Grant 2012 re: r=0.0168, p=0.922324, n=36
250yr bins, LC21 Core G. ruber (Grant: r=0.1840, p=0.282716, n=36
250yr bins, Jeita Cave J3 (Cheng 2016: r=-0.1622, p=0.344506, n=36
500yr bins, Soreq Cave (Bar-Matthews : r=0.0700, p=0.782523, n=18
500yr bins, Soreq Cave (Grant 2012 re: r=-0.0179, p=0.943836, n=18
500yr bins, LC21 Core G. ruber (Grant: r=0.1398, p=0.580206, n=18
500yr bins, Jeita Cave J3 (Cheng 2016: r=-0.1400, p=0.579567, n=18
1000yr bins, Soreq Cave (Bar-Matthews : r=0.0401, p=0.918427, n=9
1000yr bins, Soreq Cave (Grant 2012 re: r=-0.0372, p=0.924359, n=9
1000yr bins, LC21 Core G. ruber (Grant: r=0.1910, p=0.622557, n=9
1000yr bins, Jeita Cave J3 (Cheng 2016: r=-0.1033, p=0.791336, n=9
caveats: Divergence D at fine resolution has small sample sizes per bin
Pleiades dating precision (minDate/maxDate) limits temporal resolution
Speleothem and marine d18O respond to different climate forcings
The 4.2 ka event timing varies by proxy and location
Correlation ≠ causation — climate and construction may share common drivers
BH correction should be applied for multiple resolution tests
